knowledge.insight: KVD: 'I want minimum 10 sites on a tournament day, prefer 100. Bass quit biting then start again 1-2 hours later — current replenishes a spot within an hour, weather changes need 2-3 hours. If a spot produces 5-6 bass in 45 min, rotate back every 1-2 hours. Only 1-2 bass in 30-45 min? Move on. Also factor in size — 10 fish at 1.5lbs, leave for a spot producing 3-4lb fish.'
